summary: All frontend bug fixes verified successfully. 1) Daily Attendance page shows 5 employees (Rahul, Priya, Amit, Neha, Vikram), 2) Employee ID Card dialog opens correctly with QR code visible (using QRCodeSVG library), 3) Salary Calculator page loads without JavaScript errors, 4) Employees page shows all 5 employees with ID Card buttons, 5) No 'Cannot read properties of undefined' or 'month_name' errors in console.
critical_code_review_comments: Good: QRCodeSVG library properly implemented for Employee ID Card - no external API dependency
Good: PayrollCalculatorPage has null check for month_name in autoCalculatedData
Good: Employees have store_id assigned correctly and appear in Daily Attendance
Good: All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
seed_data_creation: Existing test data used: Test Store ID: cacf5d56-8f01-41c7-bb91-f81ae1009ebe with 5 employees
context_for_next_testing_agent: All reported JavaScript bugs are fixed: 1) FabricCataloguePage fetchFabrics undefined, 2) PayrollCalculatorPage month_name null check, 3) EmployeeIDCard using QRCodeSVG, 4) Employees have store_id. Daily Attendance shows all 5 employees, ID Card dialog shows QR code, Salary Calculator loads without errors.
